# The Quiet Storm

> Evidence-based anxiety guidance through somatic approaches, Vedantic philosophy, and modern neuroscience.

## About

The Quiet Storm is an independent editorial resource for people living with anxiety.
We publish evidence-based guidance drawing from modern neuroscience and ancient contemplative traditions.

Author: Kalesh — Consciousness Teacher & Writer
Website: https://kalesh.love

## Categories

- [The Nervous System](https://quietstorm.love/category/the-nervous-system)
- [The Body](https://quietstorm.love/category/the-body)
- [The Mind](https://quietstorm.love/category/the-mind)
- [The Specific](https://quietstorm.love/category/the-specific)
- [The Deeper Question](https://quietstorm.love/category/the-deeper-question)
